meta.purpose: Long-term debugging handover and recurrence prevention

single_source_of_truth.description: Backend API is the only trusted source of data.
frontend_policy: Frontend must not normalize or absorb API inconsistencies
All contract violations must be fixed at the API level
Frontend assumes received data is correct and complete
anti_patterns: Frontend-side defaulting for broken API values
Conditional fixes based on API response shape
Silent fallback logic hiding backend bugs

symptoms: UI switches momentarily after button click
UI immediately reverts to previous state
No fatal errors, only warnings or none
Completion fails with 500 Internal Server Error
incident_summary.root_cause: State inconsistency caused by unstable API contract and naming convention mismatch (Hyphen vs Underscore)

api_contract_issues.impact: DB results return nil when accessed with wrong key, leading to 0 values in API response

api_contract_issues.issue: UUID parsing error from nil string
details: str nil -> "nil" passed as UUID to DB
api_contract_issues.impact: 500 Internal Server Error during reward check or walk completion
re-frame subscriptions fail to detect active walk
UI rendering errors and state invalidation

frontend_state_issues: Optimistic update applied before API contract stabilized
load-walks event overwrote optimistic state by receiving full map instead of collection
Missing :clear-error event handler preventing UI recovery

design_decisions.chosen_approach: Fix API contract and backend handler keys instead of frontend absorption
rejected_alternatives: Conditional rendering based on partial data

key_learnings.re_frame_insight: UI flicker or rollback almost always indicates state being overwritten by a later event
key_learnings.backend_gotcha: Clojure handlers must use underscores for DB results but hyphens for API responses
key_learnings.optimistic_update_warning: Optimistic UI updates are unsafe unless API responses are fully stable and deterministic
key_learnings.anti_absorption_rule: Frontend absorption of API bugs creates future failures and should be avoided

api_checklist: DB result access in handlers uses snake_case (underscore)
Status values are fixed and documented
frontend_checklist: No conflicting state writes across events
Optimistic updates do not race with API reloads

recommended_debug_flow.action: Log raw API response to console
Check for 'nil' values or wrong keys in backend handlers
Confirm which event overwrites expected state

documentation_relationships.GEMINI_md: Core project mandates and naming convention trap warnings
documentation_relationships.debug_notes_md: Design reasoning, failures, and lessons learned
documentation_relationships.debugging_handover_json: Operational checklist and step-by-step debugging guide

future_guidelines.goal: Ensure knowledge continuity and prevent repeated failure patterns
